stemHtml: Which answer states the typical distances along the centreline of the runway of the various ILS components?

options.a:
Localizer transmitter: 100 meter behind end of runway
Glide path transmitter: 100 meter behind threshold
Middle Marker: 1.5 NM from threshold
Outer Marker: 10 NM from threshold
options.b:
Localizer transmitter: 100 meter behind end of runway
Glide path transmitter: 100 meter behind threshold
Middle Marker: 1000 meter from threshold
Outer Marker: 4 NM from threshold
options.c:
Localizer transmitter: 300 meter behind end of runway
Glide path transmitter: 300 meter behind threshold
Middle Marker: 1000 meter from threshold
Outer Marker: 4 NM from threshold
options.d:
Localizer transmitter: 300 meter behind end of runway
Glide path transmitter: 300 meter behind threshold
Middle Marker: 1.5 NM from threshold
Outer Marker: 10 NM from threshold
